drift_notes.detail: Subcommands are not architectural equals in code: of recall, show, list, learn, and update, only recall has its business logic extracted into a peer package (internal/recall). The other four handlers live as files inside internal/cli/ (show.go, list.go, learn.go, update.go)
drift_notes.reason: Persisted misalignment between intent (subcommands as equals, each with its own package) and current code. Resolution: when next touching show / list / learn / update business logic, prefer extracting to internal/<subcommand>/ packages with DI interfaces, mirroring internal/recall. Update this diagram and the catalog row for E21 once peer packages exist

elements.name: Claude Code
elements.responsibility: Execs the binary as a subprocess each time the agent's Bash tool runs an engram subcommand; consumes its stdout.
elements.subtitle: agent harness

elements.name: Claude Code memory surfaces
elements.responsibility: Read-only inputs: project + user CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules/*.md, auto-memory, skill frontmatter.

elements.name: Anthropic API
elements.responsibility: Haiku model used for recall ranking, snippet extraction, and learn-time classification.
elements.subtitle: Haiku

elements.name: Engram memory store
elements.responsibility: On-disk feedback + fact TOML state under ~/.local/share/engram/memory/.
elements.subtitle: ~/.local/share/engram/memory/

elements.name: main.go
elements.responsibility: Process entry. Calls cli.SetupSignalHandling and forwards cli.Targets into targ.Main. No business logic; excluded from coverage per project convention.
elements.subtitle: process entry

elements.name: cli
elements.responsibility: Subcommand dispatch for all five subcommands plus the embedded business-logic handlers for show, list, learn, and update (show.go, list.go, learn.go, update.go). Owns *Args arg structs and thin I/O adapter shims (os.ReadFile, os.ReadDir, os.UserHomeDir, os.Getwd, os.Getenv, exec.Command). Wires DI interfaces into the pure-logic packages. See Drift Notes — these handlers are intended to live as peer packages alongside `recall`.
elements.subtitle: dispatch + I/O adapters

elements.name: recall
elements.responsibility: Recall pipeline: orchestrator + per-source phases (CLAUDE.md, auto-memory, skill, transcript). Pure logic; consumes Finder, TranscriptReader, Summarizer, MemoryLister via DI. Currently the only subcommand with a dedicated package; the other four are absorbed into cli.
elements.subtitle: orchestrator + phases

elements.name: context
elements.responsibility: Session transcript parsing: reads .jsonl lines, computes deltas, strips tool-summary noise within a budget.
elements.subtitle: transcript reader

elements.name: memory
elements.responsibility: Shared types and read-modify-write helpers for feedback (feedback/) and fact (facts/) memory TOML files; defines FactsDir / FeedbackDir paths under the data directory.
elements.subtitle: feedback / fact records

elements.name: externalsources
elements.responsibility: Reads ranking inputs outside the engram store: project + user CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules/*.md, auto-memory, skill frontmatter; resolves frontmatter imports; caches per-discover-call.
elements.subtitle: CLAUDE.md / rules / auto-memory / skills

elements.name: anthropic
elements.responsibility: Anthropic Messages API client. Owns the HTTP request, error sentinels, and exposes a CallerFunc consumed by recall.NewSummarizer. Pinned to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.
elements.subtitle: Messages API client

elements.name: tokenresolver
elements.responsibility: Resolves the Anthropic API token from ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env or, on darwin, the macOS Keychain via security. Documented to never return a non-nil error.
elements.subtitle: env + macOS Keychain

elements.name: tomlwriter
elements.responsibility: TOML serialization for new / updated feedback and fact memory files.
elements.subtitle: TOML serialization

focus.name: engram CLI binary
focus.responsibility: Go binary entry cmd/engram/main.go, wiring internal/cli.Targets into targ.Main.

name: engram-cli-binary
preamble: Refines L2's E9 engram CLI binary into nine internal components. The shell of the binary (cmd/engram/main.go) only wires cli.Targets into targ.Main; all command logic, I/O adapters, and external integrations live under internal/. Pure-logic packages (recall, memory, tomlwriter) take all I/O as DI interfaces; thin adapter shims live in internal/cli so concrete I/O is wired only at the edge of the binary.

relationships.description: execs the binary as a subprocess (Bash tool)
builds CLI targets and runs targ.Main
delegates the recall pipeline (Orchestrator + phases) to the dedicated recall package — the one subcommand currently extracted from cli (see Drift Notes)
reads / writes feedback + fact TOML through memory types and helpers
discovers external source paths and shares the cache via discoverExternalSources
builds the Anthropic caller used by recall.NewSummarizer
resolves API token (env or Keychain) before any LLM call
reads + strips session transcripts within budget
ranks candidates and extracts snippets via Haiku (through DI Summarizer)
reads CLAUDE.md / rules / auto-memory / skill frontmatter (cached)
writes new TOML on learn / remember / update
prints briefings, recall results, and list / show output to stdout
reads project + user CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules, auto-memory, skill frontmatter
reads existing feedback + fact TOML during recall / list / show
writes new feedback + fact TOML on learn / remember / update
